testCase.name: AdaptiveBoundaryStrategy detects MathonGo question headings without capture groups
AdaptiveBoundaryStrategy extracts higher question numbers from Q-prefixed headings
AdaptiveBoundaryStrategy uses capture groups when provided
normalizeDocumentStructure corrects misdetected inline solutions when a separate answers section exists
normalizeDocumentStructure parses 9 MathonGo questions and 9 solutions after normalization
normalizeDocumentStructure reconciles stale ## Q regex when Mathpix outputs LaTeX section headings
inferSolutionNumberingRegex detects plain numbered answer lines
inferSolutionNumberingRegex detects Q-heading answer lines when present
